narrative_beat: Tela preta com brasa unica e rastro diagonal carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: absolute black frame pierced only by a single orange ember drifting in lower right and a faint crimson diagonal streak above, like a missile trail without the missile itself
subject.focal_point: the lone orange ember dissolving mid-fall
subject.secondary: The frame is 98 percent black, textured with subtle film grain; the ember emits soft amber glow dissipating into darkness

environment.location: infinite black void representing pre-dawn February 2026

composition.foreground: single floating ember in rich amber
composition.background: imperceptible hint of starless night sky

lighting.key_light: no visible key light except ember self-glow
lighting.rim_light: faint amber rim on ember particle

style.post_processing: heavy halation on ember, deep black crush, 35mm grain

symbolism.primary: dark before revelation, void awaiting the apocalyptic horseman
symbolism.secondary: a single ember as herald of what is to come

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
